rows.label: tev040901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Zarch about the beasts
on the Bias's homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Zarch about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0001
rows.name:
We hunted beasts on Tormein.
Some fed us. Some served as
friends. They helped us survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Bond between Bias and beast runs deep.
Earth aliens cannot understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Even family names tie to beasts!
Quokett... Wolfen... Valdileo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Such names come from fierce
beasts of our homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0005
rows.name: Now even on Mira, beasts live on in us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0008
rows.name:
True Bias live beside beasts
always. Though I have none of
my own now. It is shameful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Cavern Clan has beasts. They tame vicious
Miran suids. Use them for protection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Soon I will tame great suid of my own.
Then I may face Cavern Clan as equal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0011
rows.name:
This is my dream. I
hope you will help me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Zarch about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0012
rows.name:
I wish to kill many Cavern clansmen. But
chieftain forbids it. So I stay hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0013
rows.name:
I do not understand this mercy. Our kin
are dead. Butchered by Cavern Clan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Chieftain must share hatred for
them! So why does he stop me?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Someday, I will use Odsent to
avenge my mother. I swear it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0016
rows.name:
We hunted beasts on Tormein.
Some fed us. Some served as
friends. They helped us survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Bond between Bias and beast runs deep.
Earth aliens cannot understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0018
rows.name:
When you killed Odsent,
you killed half of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0019
rows.name:
I do not hold it against you. Fault
is mine. I am one who failed Odsent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0020
rows.name:
But when you killed him, my dream
shattered. Such was our bond.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0023
rows.name:
I wanted to use him for revenge. Revenge
against scum who stole my mother...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0024
rows.name:
But now Odsent's life is also stolen. I
have no dreams. No aspirations. Nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev040901_MSG0025
rows.name:
So I keep delivering cargo as Sevvy
Belgazus asked. There will be no trouble.[ST:wait ]
